name: Crazy Fatties
developer: 武汉下划线数码科技有限公司
publisher: 武汉下划线数码科技有限公司
short_description: Crazy Fatties is also crazy and cute Fat Brother designed the inspired game. It's a casual game of choice. Waiting for the levels of many games, the fat guys are happier to communicate together.
detailed_description:
Crazy Fatties is a casual level-breaking game. You can experience all game levels after purchase.
Through the operation, the player avoids danger, defeats the enemy, reaches the end within the stipulated time, and finally gets rewards!
There are different types of levels, such as encountering flames, encountering floods, or more enemies! Each has a unique experience.
Players can also enjoy the fun of collecting, gaining gold coins by winning the game in exchange for different character appearances.
